  "main_scripts": [
    "scripts/Demo/DemoScene.cs - 演示场景主入口",
    "scripts/Dialog/StoryManager.cs - 故事管理器",
    "scripts/Dialog/StoryNode.cs - 故事节点",
    "scripts/Dialog/StoryNodeContent.cs - 故事节点内容",
    "scripts/MultimodalFramework/MultimodalController.cs - 多模态控制器（核心）",
    "scripts/MultimodalFramework/LLMClient.cs - LLM API 客户端",
    "scripts/MultimodalFramework/VoiceRecorder.cs - 语音录制",
    "scripts/MultimodalFramework/OnlineASRClient.cs - 在线 ASR 客户端",
    "scripts/MultimodalFramework/OptionRegistry.cs - 选项注册表",
    "scripts/MultimodalFramework/BaseOption.cs - 选项基类",
    "scripts/MultimodalFramework/IOption.cs - 选项接口",
    "scripts/MultimodalFramework/FrameworkConfig.cs - 框架配置"
  ],
  "ui_related": [
    "scripts/Demo/DemoScene.cs - 包含 UI 代码：使用 Control、Button、Label 构建界面",
    "scenes/demo.tscn - 演示场景文件"
  ],
  "camera_related": [],
  "project_structure_notes": "这是一个 Godot 4 C# 项目，名为 'Multimodality Frame'。核心是多模态交互框架（MultimodalFramework），支持语音录制、ASR 语音识别、LLM 对话。使用 dialogue_manager 插件处理对话系统。项目结构清晰：scripts/ 按功能模块划分，scenes/ 存放场景，dialogs/ 存放对话资源。目前没有相机相关代码，UI 仅在 DemoScene 中以代码方式构建（Button、Label）。"
}
